Functional Modules.Function Description: Dedicated real-time processor for flight dynamics, sensor fusion, and control signal generation. Executes core flight control algorithms and manages all system communication.
Functional Modules.Signal Sources: Redundant Sensory Array, Satellite Positioning Module, Remote Control Receiver, Companion Computer via Data Bridge.
Functional Modules.Signal Destinations: Motor Control Output Headers, Companion Computer via Data Bridge.
Functional Modules.Implementation Logic: Receives and fuses multi-source telemetry (inertial, barometric, magnetic, GPS, RC). Computes stabilization and navigation commands. Generates precise PWM/PPM/DShot signals for ESCs. Maintains bidirectional, high-speed data link with companion computer for autonomous planning.

Functional Modules.Function Description: Fault-tolerant cluster of sensors providing spatial awareness, orientation, and altitude data.
Functional Modules.Signal Sources: Multiple Independent IMUs (gyro/accel), Dual Barometric Altimeters, Discrete Magnetometer.
Functional Modules.Implementation Logic: Multiple identical sensor units operate in parallel. Data is independently acquired and pre-processed (filtered, calibrated). A voting or consensus algorithm within the WCPU or a dedicated safety co-processor compares outputs to detect and isolate faults, providing a single, validated data stream to the main processor.

Functional Modules.Function Description: Provides physical connectors and protocol management for all external devices and motor controllers.
Functional Modules.Signal Sources: Remote Control Receiver, Satellite Positioning Module (GPS/GLONASS/etc.), Companion Computer.
Functional Modules.Signal Destinations: Wireless Central Processing Unit (WCPU), Multi-channel Motor Output Headers.
Functional Modules.Implementation Logic: Includes dedicated serial buses (UART, I2C, SPI) for GPS and RC receiver. Features a high-bandwidth interface (e.g., Ethernet, high-speed UART, USB) for the companion computer data bridge. Houses multiple motor output headers with signal conditioning to drive ESCs directly from the WCPU's timer peripherals.

Functional Modules.Function Description: Final output driver stage that delivers precise timing control signals to Electronic Speed Controllers (ESCs).
Functional Modules.Signal Destinations: Electronic Speed Controllers (ESCs) for multi-rotor motors.
Functional Modules.Implementation Logic: Receives digital command packets (e.g., DShot) or PWM timing values from the WCPU. Buffers and level-shifts signals as needed. Provides robust, isolated (optically or magnetically) output channels to protect the main board from motor/ESC electrical noise and faults.

Functional Modules.Function Description: Conditions input power from the UAV's battery and provides stable, isolated voltage rails to all onboard modules.
Functional Modules.Signal Destinations: All Functional Modules (WCPU, Sensory Array, Interface Hub, etc.).
Functional Modules.Implementation Logic: Incorporates reverse-polarity protection, fusing, and input filtering. Uses switching regulators for high efficiency to generate core logic voltages (e.g., 3.3V, 5V). May include low-noise LDOs for analog sensor supplies. Provides power sequencing and monitoring for safe startup and fault detection.
